title: In Your Lane
description: Adds wacky bowling alley carpet, ETC
body:
Have you ever wanted to build a bowling alley in minecraft but lacked that wacky carpet that looks right out of the 90's?

Do you wish you could have the lanes in that hypothetical bowling alley be actually wood and not some kind of ice?

WELL DO WE (royal we) HAVE THE SOLUTION FOR YOU!
Introducing the IN YOUR LANE mod, which adds the dark carpet blocks, a glow-in-the-dark blockset crafted with amethyst shards and black wool, and can be turned into one of six designs via a stonecutter!

The mod also includes waxed variants of vanilla planks which are slippery! (0.9 value compared to ice's 0.98 and blue ice's 0.989)

The mod does not add stair or slab variants of any of the blocks. I wanted to keep the filesize light.

with the new update we also added a bowling pin that falls over if any entity (including items) collides with it. it also rights itself upon redstone power. it has a hinge, it makes sense shush. (item texture by starrysock)

THE MOD ALSO ADDS A PNG OF A BOWLING BALL! no longer completely useless! now only slightly useless!

ENJOY MOD OKAY BYE.

Side note: I recommend using a mod that allows you to throw items with varying strengths alongside this mod, like Power Drop or Yeet if you have sinytra connector.

[Brought to you by P.E.A.K. Industries (not really)]
